meterReadings.title: Electricity meter
meterReadings.meterValueNonNegative: Meter value must be zero or greater

meterReadings.estimatedChargeDetail: Average {avg} kWh × 1.3 — still submit to correct next month
meterReadings.overdueExplanation: Submit your late reading below. This will not change your {month} charge but will correct next month.

meterReadings.hintLate: This will not change your {month} charge but will correct next month

note.submitted: Thank you for submitting your readings on time
note.submittedLate: Your readings were submitted after {deadline}, but future charges will be adjusted based on your submission

note.due: Your consumption will be adjusted based on your submitted readings
